submission_blockers.description: An array of submission_blockers, each with a selected unblock option.

items.description: Request object for resolving a submission blocker. Each submission_blocker should include a selected unblock option.

blocker_type.description: The type of submission_blocker that is blocking the payment.

selected_option.description: The selected option to unblock the payment's submission_blocker.

items.title: Payroll-Submission-Blocker-Request-Type
